_provenance: v4 motion-packet rewrite 2026-05-16 per PROPOSAL_player_driven_argument.md §1 (Whimsy subsection) + §41 SPRINT_LOG checklist item 8. Whimsy surfaces the rights memo (marginalia anchor) and the 2018 property-transfer fact (civic-records hobby) without declaring the fair-hearing doctrine as the winning argument. The 'fair-hearing argument can sing' calibration anchor is moved out of the recruitment state and kept as a post-recruitment posture line; recruitment itself becomes a literal hand-off of two pieces of paper (the memo and the records folder). Two new decoy-decision states land D3 (standing/wrong-party) and D4 (overbroad remedy) as named auxiliary offers; both write the corresponding decoy_* bool per PROPOSAL §3.2. Address forms unchanged: 'Dr. A. Cula' pre-recruit, bare 'Cula' post-recruit.
_anti_ai_voice_pass: No contrastive antithesis. Em-dashes capped per Whimsy's declamatory register (single sanctioned per line). No scrub-list vocabulary. The 'folder of who-owns-what' civic-records line is the v4 in-fiction justification for D3 surfacing here.

states._comment: v4 motion-packet rewrite. Whimsy hands Cula two pieces of paper and stops short of naming the winning frame. The Rights Memo with espresso marginalia is the recruitment hand-off; the 2018 property-transfer record is the civic-records-hobby surfacing. The 'fair-hearing argument can sing' line is removed from this state — its declarative function (this is the right argument) was the answer-giving the v3 brief flags. on_dismiss sets met_whimsy, recruited_whimsy, surfaced_property_transfer (Whimsy mentioned the 2018 transfer aloud). Address form 'Dr. A. Cula' pre-recruit.

lines.speaker: cula
lines.text: Mr. Whimsy. Cula, Pig & Swine. We need a second voice in court tomorrow.

lines: Dr. A. Cula. Sit. Have you anything beyond procedural vibes, or am I to be recruited on atmosphere?

lines.speaker: cula
lines.text: Notice went to an address the client left two years ago. The objection is in the papers; the record does not show it. Hearing at fourteen hundred.

lines: Ah. A wrong-door file, with the right door also in the file. I have heard worse music.
Marginalia in espresso. Half the argument is already mine — whichever half you decide it is.
Before the music, a fact you may want. I keep a folder of who-owns-what. Marginal pastime. Occasionally useful.

Your landlord sold the building in two thousand and eighteen. The new owner is a property concern out of Mokotów. The eviction notice arrives under the prior owner's hand. The lease will have assigned forward at transfer — the new owner inherits the obligation — but some sharp counsel would raise the standing question anyway.
Not the music I would lead with. The folder is yours if you want it.
I will lend my voice tomorrow at fourteen hundred. The shape you bring, I will sing.

states._comment: v4 NEW state — D3 (standing / wrong party) decision moment per PROPOSAL §1.2. Fires once after Whimsy has handed Cula the records folder. Whimsy offers the standing question as a colorable but procedurally uphill auxiliary theory; the options write chapter1.decoy_standing_wrong_party. once:true. Whimsy uses bare 'Cula' (post-recruit). No chain — the choice is committed and the player moves on.
lines: Cula. The standing question I named earlier. The new owner is the proper plaintiff under the assignment; the prior landlord persists under it as well.
An aggressive theory. The bench will note it, then turn back to the door on the envelope. Include the standing point in the motion, or hold it for cross.

choices.text: Hold it. The procedural defect ends the matter before standing matters.
Include it. If we are asking the court to set aside, ask widely.

states._comment: v4 NEW state — D4 (overbroad remedy) decision moment per PROPOSAL §1.2. Whimsy's rhetorical-flourish offer ('for theatre we could ask for the world'). The choice writes chapter1.decoy_overbroad_remedy. The 'remedy discipline (load-bearing)' rule from story.txt Beat 12 makes the procedural-reset-only ask the canonical remedy; the offer is the temptation, the discipline is the test. once:true. The trigger is intentionally permissive — Whimsy will offer the flourish whether or not the standing question has been resolved.
lines: While the file is open, Cula. The remedy ask.

For theatre we could ask for the world — permanent injunction, dismissal with prejudice, costs on the indemnity scale. Or we could ask only for what we need: the procedural reset, hearing rescheduled, merits preserved.
Both are sayable. One is winnable. Pick.

choices.text: Only what we need. Reset the hearing. The bench will not thank us for asking widely.
Ask widely. We can always retreat to the narrow remedy at oral argument.

states._comment: v4 NEW state — cold-pushback complement to crab_post_halina_incapacity_refuses and murrow_post_decoy_incapacity, per the task brief ('Incapacity blunder gets cold in-fiction pushback from Halina/Crab/Murrow' — Whimsy is added for completeness as the third voice in the room). Whimsy's register is rhetorical, so his refusal lands as a refusal-of-rhetoric: he will not sing the line. Address form 'Dr. A. Cula' — the friend-form is suspended for this beat. once:true.
lines: Dr. A. Cula. I sing for the case. I do not sing for that.
Find me another note. I will lend my voice to any procedural shape that does not require me to call Mrs. Sikorska feeble in open court.

states._comment: V1.5 post-recruitment progression. Gates on both recruited flags; fires while the client meeting is still pending. Whimsy registers the missing ingredient. Bare 'Cula' per AGENTS.md §Address forms (post-recruit).
lines: Cula. We have procedure and rhetoric. What we do not yet have is a client in the room. That tends to be useful.

states._comment: V1.5 post-recruitment progression. Fires once archive research is complete and court_ready is still pending. Whimsy supplies the court-door framing from whimsy_ch01_019. Bare 'Cula' per AGENTS.md §Address forms.
lines: Cula. We are not asking the court for miracles. Merely a doorway through which the client may be heard.

states._comment: V1.5 generic fallback repeat beat for post-recruitment Whimsy, pre-court. Voice from whimsy_global_024. Bare 'Cula' per AGENTS.md §Address forms.
lines: Cula. Somewhere nearby, a right is being reduced to administration. Let us be irritating about it.

states._comment: V1.4 coffee reaction — S-grade, post-recruit. Voice draft from minigames.txt §Character reactions §Whimsy Perfect ('Behold! A black-robed liquid of justice!'). Post-recruit Whimsy uses bare 'Cula' per AGENTS.md §Address forms. Single sanctioned em-dash for the declamation.
lines: Cula! Behold — a black-robed liquid of justice.

states._comment: V1.4 coffee reaction — D/F-grade, post-recruit. Voice verbatim from minigames.txt §Character reactions §Whimsy Bad ('A tragic brew, but tragedy has rights.').
lines: Cula. A tragic brew, but tragedy has rights.

states._comment: V1.4 coffee reaction — S-grade, pre-recruit. Authored for completeness per the design brief; in normal play the coffee minigame trigger requires recruited_whimsy, so this branch is practically unreachable. Pre-recruit Whimsy uses 'Dr. A. Cula' per AGENTS.md §Address forms.
lines: Dr. A. Cula! Behold — a black-robed liquid of justice.
Dr. A. Cula. A tragic brew, but tragedy has rights.

idle_flavor: A procedural argument without a metaphor is like coffee without water. Dry and slightly offensive.
